extra.reason: metric.py implemented; self-test passes (perfect=0.0, random=0.96, reversed=1.0); harmonic mean correctly handles degenerate zero-denominator case returning 1.0 (worst)

download_data.py implemented; supports Kaggle download (requires creds) and synthetic generation for pipeline testing. Synthetic dataset generated (64 train + 16 test) and verified. .gitignore updated to exclude dataset/ artifacts and Kaggle creds.

data.py implements load_metadata, stratified_kfold_indices, split_train_val, class_weights, FREUIDDataset, build_transforms, make_dataloaders. Self-test passes end-to-end on synthetic dataset: 64 train rows stratified into 48/16 split, batches of (8,3,96,96), pos_weight correct.

model.py (timm backbone + single-logit head) and train.py (AdamW, cosine LR, AMP autocast, grad clip, EMA, validation with FREUID Score) implemented. End-to-end smoke test passed: 2 epochs on 64-sample synthetic dataset ran in ~12s on CPU, saved best.pt, reported val_freuid=0.8 (synthetic data is random noise so high FREUID is expected).

infer.py implements TTA inference (hflip-averaged) and write_submission which aligns to sample_submission.csv row order. Smoke test on synthetic test set: produced submission.csv with 16 rows matching sample_submission.csv exactly, all scores in [0,1], no NaN. Handles ensemble via repeated --ckpt.

code/requirements.txt (pinned deps), code/REPORT.md (technical report covering method/training data/architecture/inference/external resources), code/README.md (run instructions, sanity checks, knob table) all written.
